response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar
ENTITY Material
PK n_material
ATTR n_material : integer : PK
ATTR description_material : varchar
ENTITY Operation
PK n_operation
ATTR n_operation : integer : PK
ATTR description_operation : varchar
ENTITY Order
PK n_order
ATTR n_order : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR date : date
ENTITY OrderOperation
PK order_operation_id
ATTR order_operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR n_material : integer : FK
ATTR n_operation : integer : FK
ATTR n_order : integer : FK
ATTR quantity : decimal
ATTR timestamp : datetime : FK
ATTR workcenter_id : integer
ENTITY Timestamp
PK timestamp
ATTR timestamp : datetime : PK
ATTR date : date
ENTITY Record
PK order_operation_id
ATTR order_operation_id : integer : PK : FK
REL Record -> OrderOperation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=order_operation_id
REL Order -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL OrderOperation -> Material : 0..N -> 1 : FK=n_material
REL OrderOperation -> Operation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=n_operation
REL OrderOperation -> Order : 0..N -> 1 : FK=n_order
REL OrderOperation -> Timestamp : 0..N -> 1 : FK=timestamp
